title: Statistical analysis of the Indus script using n-grams (preprint)

claims.normalized_claim: Indus script sign frequencies follow a Zipf-Mandelbrot distribution.
claims.falsification_condition: If frequency distribution deviates from Zipf-Mandelbrot law.

claims.normalized_claim: There are specific text-beginning and text-ending signs in the Indus corpus.
claims.glossa_lab_evidence: Phase-43: 20 TERMINAL_STRONG + 40 INITIAL_STRONG signs identified in V3 corpus [VERIFIED]
